questions.question: What OS analogy does MemGPT build on?
questions.question_zh: MemGPT 建立在什么 OS 类比之上？
options: Virtual memory: main context as RAM, external store as disk, memory tools as page in and out
options_zh: 虚拟内存：主上下文当作 RAM、外部存储当作磁盘、memory 工具相当于换入换出（page in/out）
questions.explanation: MemGPT maps prompt to RAM, external store to disk, and memory tools to page-fault-style transfers.
questions.explanation_zh: MemGPT 把 prompt 映射成 RAM、外部存储映射成磁盘、memory 工具映射成类似缺页中断的传输。

questions.question: Why do bigger context windows not fully solve memory?
questions.question_zh: 为什么更大的 context window 并不能完全解决 memory 问题？
options: Overflow, dilution of attention, and lack of cross-session persistence still bite even with 128k windows
options_zh: 厂商把它们限制在 4k tokens
即便有 128k 窗口，溢出、attention 被稀释和缺乏跨会话持久化仍然存在
questions.explanation: Mem0 measured 128k-window baselines still missing facts a 4k agent with external memory catches; overflow, dilution, and persistence remain.
questions.explanation_zh: Mem0 测得 128k 窗口的基线仍然会漏掉一个带外部 memory 的 4k agent 能抓到的事实；溢出、稀释和持久化问题依然存在。

questions.question: Which of these is NOT one of MemGPT's canonical memory tools?
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一个不是 MemGPT 的标准 memory 工具？
questions.explanation: There is no gradient memory tool; the surface is core/archival/conversation operations.
questions.explanation_zh: 没有 gradient memory 工具；接口面是 core / archival / conversation 这些操作。

questions.question: What does the interrupt pattern do in MemGPT?
questions.question_zh: MemGPT 中的 interrupt 模式做什么？
options: It halts the entire agent run on any error
Mid-conversation the agent invokes a memory tool, the runtime executes it, and the result splices into the next turn
It bypasses the context window entirely
options_zh: 在任何错误上都停止整个 agent 运行
对话进行中 agent 调用一个 memory 工具，runtime 执行它，结果在下一轮拼接进上下文
questions.explanation: Memory-as-interrupt: invoke memory tool, runtime fetches, result returns as a new observation on the next turn (like a Unix read()).
questions.explanation_zh: Memory-as-interrupt：调用 memory 工具，runtime 取数据，结果在下一轮作为新的观察返回（类似 Unix 的 read()）。

questions.question: Which production system did MemGPT evolve into in 2024?
questions.question_zh: MemGPT 在 2024 年演变成了哪个生产级系统？
questions.explanation: MemGPT became Letta in September 2024; the research repo cpacker/MemGPT still exists as the origin.
questions.explanation_zh: MemGPT 在 2024 年 9 月改名为 Letta；研究仓库 cpacker/MemGPT 仍作为源头存在。

questions.question: What is memory poisoning in this context?
questions.question_zh: 在这个语境下什么叫 memory poisoning？
options: A bug that corrupts vector indices
An attacker's content gets stored as a memory note and is re-ingested on future recalls
Reading from disk when RAM is available
options_zh: 一个会破坏向量索引的 bug
攻击者的内容被存成一条 memory note，在之后召回时被反复读入
在 RAM 可用时仍然去读磁盘
questions.explanation: External memory is retrieved text; if attacker-reachable content lands in a memory note the agent re-ingests it next session.
questions.explanation_zh: 外部 memory 是被检索回来的文本；如果攻击者可触达的内容落进了一条 memory note，agent 在下一会话又会把它读进去。

questions.question: Why does the lesson say production memory systems are MemGPT variants?
questions.question_zh: 为什么本节课说生产级 memory 系统都是 MemGPT 的变体？
options: They use the same vector DB
Letta, Mem0, Assistants threads, and Claude Agent SDK all run the two-tier (or more) paged-memory pattern; differences are operational shape
options_zh: 它们用同一个向量数据库
Letta、Mem0、Assistants threads 以及 Claude Agent SDK 都跑两层（或更多）的分页 memory 模式；差异只在工程形态
questions.explanation: Pick by operational shape, not pattern; all share the MemGPT page in/out skeleton.
questions.explanation_zh: 按工程形态选型，而不是按模式选型；它们都共享 MemGPT 的换入换出骨架。
